svg.text: DrD Hub — Responsive Mobile & Tablet Wireframes
Progressive design: phone (375px), tablet (768px), desktop unchanged (1024px+)
Breakpoints: sm (640px), md (768px), lg (1024px) — Tailwind mobile-first
Current: sidebar always visible, stacks above content. Proposed: hamburger + slide-out drawer.
← ⋮ overflow: Export CSV, Export PDF, Logout
← User info moved from header to drawer
← Nav items with 44px min touch height
At md: breakpoint — sidebar returns, header shows full controls. Same as desktop but narrower.
← Identical to desktop layout, just tighter
Columns stack vertically. Domain tabs for horizontal navigation. Touch DnD with hold-to-drag.
← Quick filter: search icon expands on tap
← Horizontal scroll pills for domain tabs
← Cards: full width, domain color top stripe
Wide tables converted to stacked cards on mobile. Desktop table unchanged (hidden md:table / md:hidden).
Full-screen on mobile (instead of 780px side panel). Scrollable tab bar.
← Tabs scroll horizontally (9 tabs don't fit)
← Small fields: 2-3 per row on phone too
← Persona Radar: below form, smaller height
ResponsiveContainer adapts width. Heights reduced. Gantt gets horizontal scroll.
Fixed left column for initiative names
• Touch: tap dot to see tooltip (no hover)
• Default to Agenda view on mobile
• Calendar grid still available via toggle
Tablet gets the full desktop layout with sidebar. Boards use 2-3 columns instead of 5-6.
Tab bar scrollable. Users table → cards. Settings stacked. Data actions full-width.
← Users: card layout with avatar, badges
← Tap card to expand (edit role, aliases)
← PENDING users highlighted with amber bg
Touch sensor configuration and interaction patterns for all drag-and-drop views.
Problem: Conflicts with touch scroll on mobile
• Tag badges: increase padding on mobile
2. AppShell: header overflow menu for Export/PDF/Logout
3. DnD boards: add TouchSensor to all 4 DnD components
7. RaciMatrix: grouped card layout below md
11. Calendar: default to agenda on mobile
13. Touch targets: audit all interactive elements
All changes use Tailwind mobile-first prefixes:
• Existing elements: hidden md:block (unchanged on desktop)
• Card views: md:hidden parallel to hidden md:table
• Touch targets: py-2.5 md:py-1.5 (md = current value)
RULE: Never modify unprefixed or md:/lg: classes.
Phase 3: CalendarPage, GanttPage, FiltersBar, all components
